scripts.copy-keys: rm -rf public/keys public/zkir && mkdir -p public/keys public/zkir && cp ../contract/src/managed/polypay/keys/* public/keys/ && cp ../contract/src/managed/polypay/zkir/* public/zkir/ && cp ../contract/src/managed/token/keys/* public/keys/ && cp ../contract/src/managed/token/zkir/* public/zkir/ && cp ../contract/src/managed/test-shielded/keys/* public/keys/ && cp ../contract/src/managed/test-shielded/zkir/* public/zkir/
scripts.build: tsc && vite build --mode preprod && cp -r ../contract/src/managed/polypay/keys ./dist/keys && cp -r ../contract/src/managed/polypay/zkir ./dist/zkir && cp ../contract/src/managed/token/keys/* ./dist/keys/ && cp ../contract/src/managed/token/zkir/* ./dist/zkir/
